Tools.title: Everything You Need in One Place
Tools.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of advanced AI tools designed to save you time and elevate your productivity.

t1.title: Audio to Text
t1.desc: Transcribe any audio file to highly accurate text supporting over 50 languages.

t2.title: Text to Audio
t2.desc: Convert text into natural, realistic human voices with varied emotions.

t3.title: Background Removal
t3.desc: Remove image backgrounds flawlessly with one click using AI.

t4.title: Smart Translation
t4.desc: Accurate, context-aware translation supporting diverse languages and dialects.

t5.title: Video Processing
t5.desc: Enhance video quality and generate automatic captions.

t6.title: Audio Enhancement
t6.desc: Remove background noise and enhance audio quality like a studio.

t7.title: Smart Writing
t7.desc: Generate creative articles, marketing copy, and emails in seconds.

t8.title: Text Extraction (OCR)
t8.desc: Extract text from images and PDF documents easily.

t9.title: Music Generation
t9.desc: Create royalty-free music tailored to your specific mood and style.

HowItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: From upload to result in seconds

s1.title: Upload your file
s1.desc: Drag and drop or select a file from your device. We support all common formats.

s2.title: Select the tool
s2.desc: Choose from over 12 specialized AI tools tailored to your needs.

s3.title: Get the result
s3.desc: Professional results ready for immediate download at the highest quality.

Features.title: Unmatched Features
Features.subtitle: Designed to be the best in every detail

f1.title: Ultra-fast Processing
f1.desc: Instant results in less than a second thanks to advanced infrastructure.

f2.title: Total Security & Privacy
f2.desc: Your data is protected with military-grade encryption and never used for other purposes.

f3.title: Multi-language Support
f3.desc: Over 100 supported languages, including full Arabic dialect support.

f4.title: Advanced GPT Tech
f4.desc: We use the latest AI models to ensure the highest possible accuracy.

f5.title: Save 90% of Time
f5.desc: What used to take hours now takes mere seconds.

f6.title: Analytics & Reports
f6.desc: Track your usage and view detailed statistics for every tool.

f7.title: Developer API
f7.desc: Integrate our tools into your apps easily via a professional documented API.

f8.title: Continuous Updates
f8.desc: We add new tools and features constantly at no extra charge.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by over 50,000 users
Testimonials.subtitle: Read what our clients say about their experience

r1.text: "The background removal tool is very professional. The results are 10 times better than tools at 10x the price. My whole team moved to this platform."
r1.author: Sarah Ibrahim

r2.text: "The API is very easy to integrate into my projects. The documentation is excellent and the speed is incredible. I highly recommend it for any developer."
r2.author: Mohammad Al-Omari

r3.text: "The Arabic text-to-speech accuracy is the best I've tried. The voices sound incredibly natural and not robotic like other tools."
r3.author: Ahmad Hassan
